bird.name: Long-tailed wood partridge
bird.summary: The long-tailed wood partridge (Dendrortyx macroura) is a bird species in the family Odontophoridae, the New World quail. It is found only…

locations.name: 瓦哈卡州
locations.summary: 瓦哈卡州（西班牙語：Oaxaca，發音：[waˈχaka] ）是墨西哥合眾國的一個州，位於該國的南部，臨太平洋。2005年估計人口為 3,506,821人。首府瓦哈卡市。 历史 名称 瓦哈卡的州名来自其首府瓦哈卡市的名称。这个名字来自纳瓦…

relations.subject: Long-tailed wood partridge
relations.evidence: oaxacae, Oaxaca (southern Mexico) The long-tailed wood partridge inhabits humid pine-oak, pine, fir, and montane evergreen forests with dense understories

relations.subject: Long-tailed wood partridge
relations.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the long-tailed wood partridge as being of Least Concern. However, its main threat is "habitat loss by land use and land cover change caused by human activities."
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
